questions.question: Explain the difference between true color and pseudocolor image processing.
expectedPoints: True color represents natural object colors
Pseudocolor assigns arbitrary colors to grayscale values
True color input is typically RGB data
Pseudocolor input is single-channel intensity data

questions.question: Describe the intensity slicing technique for pseudocolor processing with a suitable diagram.
expectedPoints: Partitioning of grayscale range into intervals
Assignment of colors to each interval
